title: Salty Crunchy Thai Lamb Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and crunchy solo-dinner dish featuring lamb stock, roast lamb pieces, and plant-based-friendly vegetables for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Lamb Stock
ingredients.notes: Use any available type of lamb stock or vegetable stock

ingredients.name: Roast Lamb Pieces
ingredients.notes: Ensure pieces are at room temperature for easier cutting and cooking

ingredients.name: Vegetable Sticks (e.g., Carrot, Bell Pepper)
ingredients.notes: Wash and prepare vegetables to be used in stir-fry

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: To taste, can be adjusted based on preference

ingredients.name: Chili Paste or Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: To taste, can be adjusted for spiciness

ingredients.name: Cornstarch Mix
ingredients.notes: For creating a thick sauce to coat vegetables and lamb pieces

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil.
Add minced garlic and chili paste/flakes to the hot pan, stirring until fragrant and slightly golden.
Season with soy sauce and fish sauce if using, then add chopped lamb pieces and stir-fry for about 2 minutes per side until browned.

Remove lamb from wok and set aside. In the same wok, add more oil if necessary, then sauté chopped vegetables (e.g., carrots, bell peppers) with salt to taste, stirring occasionally for 4-5 minutes until slightly softened.
Return the roasted lamb pieces to the wok along with any accumulated juices from the pan, and pour in cornstarch water mixture. Mix well to create a thick sauce coating all ingredients evenly.
Stir in oyster sauce if using, then cook everything together for another 2-3 minutes until the vegetables are tender yet crispy and the sauce is fully integrated.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving hot.
